message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Developer" as dev
participant "Vercel Build Machine" as build
participant "CMS" as cms
participant "Vercel Production Machine" as prod

dev -> build : Git push
build -> build : Compile
activate build

frame "Collecting page data" as frame
  build -> cms : Fetch content data
  cms -> build : Return content data
end frame

build -> build : Generate static pages
build -> prod : Upload build output
activate prod
prod -> prod : Deploy
deactivate prod

deactivate build

@enduml
